title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Kaido, Unknown person #10, Momonosuke, Yamato, Unknown person #11, Nami as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of you ever wanna be pirates, I'll come for you right away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just remember, I won't have any weaklings on board!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Some day, I will surpass Kozuki Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be by your side when you do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, let's set course for Hakumai. The main port is there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was told there's a lift that can lower ships down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought since we scaled a waterfall to get here, we'd have to fall down it to leave!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaha... yeah, that makes sense. You guys would use the main port. It's the safe and sound way after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being safe is good! Don't let him get to you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, Captain! What's with that face! We all think the main port is better!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The might of the OutLaws recruited by Lord Momo- Nosuke and Kin'Emon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...made them akin to real-life wisdom kings.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their power descended like a wrathful tsunami, obliterating all in its path!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the Yokai possessed giant oilran failed to withstand their assault!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The heavens themselves were torn as painful shrieks remembered through the air.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During that chaos, Princess Hyori was accosted by Crochi, the snake that seemingly persisted in the flames...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in a desperate last ditch attempt for his spiteful vengeance!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
